tidyterra 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Function reference

Coercing objects

Convert Spat* to other type of objects or create SpatRasters from tibbles.

as_coordinates()
Get cell number, row and column from a SpatRaster
as_spatraster()
Coerce a data frame to SpatRaster
as_tibble(<SpatRaster>) as_tibble(<SpatVector>)
Coerce a Spat* object to data frames

dplyr methods

Methods from {dplyr} implemented for Spat* objects.

filter(<SpatRaster>) filter(<SpatVector>)
Subset cells/geometries of Spat* objects
mutate(<SpatRaster>) mutate(<SpatVector>)
Create, modify, and delete cell values/layers/attributes of Spat* objects
select(<SpatRaster>) select(<SpatVector>)
Subset layers/attributes of Spat* objects
slice(<SpatRaster>) slice(<SpatVector>) slice_head(<SpatRaster>) slice_head(<SpatVector>) slice_tail(<SpatRaster>) slice_tail(<SpatVector>) slice_min(<SpatRaster>) slice_min(<SpatVector>) slice_max(<SpatRaster>) slice_max(<SpatVector>) slice_sample(<SpatRaster>) slice_sample(<SpatVector>) slice_rows() slice_cols() slice_colrows()
Subset cells/rows/columns/geometries using their positions

tidyr methods

Methods from {tidyr} implemented for Spat* objects.

drop_na(<SpatRaster>) drop_na(<SpatVector>)
Drop cells and attributes of Spat* objects containing missing values
replace_na(<SpatRaster>) replace_na(<SpatVector>)
Replace NAs with specified values

ggplot2 utils

Create {ggplot2} objects from Spat* objects.

geom_spatraster()
Visualise SpatRaster objects
geom_spatraster_rgb()
Visualise SpatRaster objects as images
geom_spatvector() geom_spatvector_label() geom_spatvector_text()
Visualise SpatVector objects
scale_fill_terrain_d() scale_fill_terrain_c() scale_fill_terrain_b()
Terrain colour fill scales from grDevices

Helpers

Additional set of functions provided by {tidyterra}.

compare_spatrasters()
Compare attributes of two SpatRasters
is_regular_grid()
Check if x and y positions conforms a regular grid
pull_crs()
Extract CRS on WKT format

Other functions

Miscelanea

About the package

tidyterra-package
tidyterra: 'tidyverse' Methods for 'terra' Objects

On this page

Developed by Diego Hernangómez.
